leadText: Max Honey (Japanese: ダイミツ Dai Honey) is a type of item that was introduced in Generation VIII. It is a type of honey produced by Dynamax Vespiquen.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a fainted Pokémon, it revives the Pokémon and restores all of the Pokémon's HP . Additional effect [ edit | edit source ] It is required as an additional Max Soup ingredient to give or remove Urshifu 's Gigantamax Factor .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh IA Honeycalm Island (from the story event Max Raid Battle with Dynamax Vespiquen ) Various Max Raid Battles with Combee and Vespiquen on Honeycalm Island

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding this honey to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It also has the same effect as a Max Revive .

It also has the same effect as a Max Revive .
